login.title: NEW JERSEY DEVELOPMENTS
login.subtitle: It's all about The Experience
login.registerDescription: Click "Register as Employee" to create your account. Your registration will be reviewed by an administrator.
login.registrationSuccessful: Registration successful! Please wait for admin approval.

register.title: Join Our Team
register.subtitle: Register for HR ERP System
register.managedDepartmentsDescription: Select all departments you will be responsible for managing. You can select multiple departments by clicking on each one:
register.selectAtLeastOneDepartment: Please select at least one department to manage
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
register.managersSelectDepartment: Managers must select at least one department to manage.
register.companyEmailRequired: Please use your company email (@newjerseyegypt.com or @gycegypt.com)
register.registrationSuccessful: Registration successful! Your account is pending approval by an administrator.
register.nextStep1: Your account will be reviewed by an administrator
register.nextStep2: You'll receive an email notification once approved
register.nextStep3: You can then log in with your credentials

dashboard.canSubmitPaidExcuse: You can submit paid excuse requests
dashboard.resetsMonthly: Resets on the 25th of each month

nav.employeeDesc: Submit requests, preview forms, and review your overtime report.
nav.managerDesc: Approve team requests, review forms, and manage your own time off.
nav.adminDesc: Users, forms, ATS, and attendance across the organization.
nav.superAdminDesc: Users, forms, audit logs, backups, and system-wide attendance.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.statsHint: Counts reflect current filters on the Forms tab when you open it.
adminDashboard.noInsightsData: No data yet. Upload attendance to see insights.
adminDashboard.usersSectionDesc: Search and filter accounts, approve registrations, and manage roles.
adminDashboard.searchUsersPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or department…
adminDashboard.formsSectionDesc: Pick a time range, then filter by request type, search, and work through the pipeline.
adminDashboard.searchFormsPlaceholder: Search by employee name, email, or department…
adminDashboard.vacationCardManageDesc: Update and adjust employee vacation balances.
adminDashboard.vacationCardReportDesc: Export and review vacation usage across the team.
adminDashboard.vacationCardPersonalDesc: Your own time off, sick leave, mission, and other personal requests.

userManagement.filterSimple: Quick search (use the search box above)
userManagement.toolbarHint: Advanced filters apply together with the search box. Table view is for scanning many rows like a spreadsheet.
userManagement.noUsersBody: Try a different search, switch filter style, or create a new user.

userTitleImport.title: Import job title & location
userTitleImport.description: Upload the NJD Excel file. This updates job title and location only — departments are never changed.
userTitleImport.columnsHint: Uses columns: Code2, English Name, Job Title, Location
userTitleImport.applySuccess: Job title and location updated successfully

superAdminDashboard.title: Super Admin
superAdminDashboard.statsHint: User counts update on the Users tab. Form counts update when you load or filter the Forms tab.
superAdminDashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search users (name, email, role, dept.) or forms (name, type)…
superAdminDashboard.userMgmtDesc: All accounts, roles, department groups, and flags
superAdminDashboard.formMgmtDesc: Filter by date first, then narrow by type or search. Export or correct entries below.
superAdminDashboard.submitPersonalSubtitle: Vacation, mission, sick leave, etc. (not for editing others’ records)
superAdminDashboard.noFormsBody: Change search or month filters, or refresh the list.
superAdminDashboard.searchFormsList: Search this list (name, email, department, type)
superAdminDashboard.pipelineHint: Counts below match the request type and date filter you chose.

userAvatar.uploadFailed: Could not upload photo. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP under 2MB.

systemSettings.title: System settings
systemSettings.subtitle: Configure company-wide HR policies without code deployments
systemSettings.payPeriodAnchorDayHint: Day of each month when excuse quotas reset (e.g. 25)

formManagement.filterEvent: Leave / trip / activity in this month
formManagement.timezoneHint: Month boundaries use Egypt time (UTC+2) so they line up with local calendar dates.

forms.submitPersonalRequests: Submit your own personal vacation, sick leave, or other requests
forms.managerPersonalNote: This is for YOUR personal leave (not team member requests)
forms.adminPersonalNote: This is for YOUR personal leave (not for other users)
forms.employeePersonalNote: This form is for YOUR personal leave requests that will require approval
forms.vacationRequestHelp: Request time off for vacation, personal days, or unpaid leave
forms.excuseRequestHelp: Request a few hours off during a work day
forms.wfhRequestHelp: Request to work from home for specific hours/tasks
forms.extraHoursRequestHelp: Only available when fingerprint shows overtime beyond 8 hours on a working day.
forms.overtimeRequestHelp: Only available when fingerprint shows overtime beyond 8 hours on a working day. Submit the date, hours worked, and work description.
forms.sickLeaveRequestHelp: Request medical leave due to illness or health issues
forms.missionRequestHelp: Request approval for a business trip with dates and destination
forms.halfDayHelp: Take half a day off on a single date (deducts 0.5 from your annual balance)
forms.selectHalfDayDate: Choose the date for your half-day vacation
forms.selectFirstDayVacation: Choose the first day of your vacation
forms.selectLastDayVacation: Choose the last day of your vacation
forms.submissionMonthRangeHelp: Rolling period: 25th → 25th (e.g. 25 Jan–25 Feb), including late-month dates into the next month
forms.chooseDateExcuse: Choose the date when you took the excuse
forms.selectStartTime: Select the start time for your excuse
forms.selectFirstDaySickLeave: Choose the first day of your sick leave
forms.selectLastDaySickLeave: Choose the last day of your sick leave
forms.uploadMedicalCertificate: Upload medical certificate, doctor's note, or hospital report (PDF, Word, or Image files, max 15MB)
forms.wfhMarketingOnly: Marketing team only - Submit your work from home request with the date and what you'll be working on.
forms.selectWfhDate: Select the date you will be working from home
forms.wfhWorkingOnPlaceholder: Describe what you will be working on today (e.g., Social media content, Campaign analysis, Client proposals...)
forms.describeTasksForDay: Describe your tasks/projects for the day
forms.describeWorkFromHome: Describe the tasks you will be working on from home...
forms.provideWorkDetails: Provide details about your work activities
forms.enterHoursFromHome: Enter the number of hours you'll work from home
forms.extraHoursMarketingOnly: Request overtime for dates when fingerprint attendance shows more than 8 hours on a working day.
forms.selectExtraHoursDate: Select the date when you worked overtime hours
forms.enterExtraHours: Enter the number of overtime hours worked
forms.extraHoursHelper: Enter the number of overtime hours you worked (0.5 - 12 hours)
forms.extraHoursDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the work that is planned to be completed during overtime hours
forms.describeWorkDone: Describe the work that is planned to be completed during overtime hours
forms.selectMissionStartDate: Select the first day of your trip
forms.selectMissionEndDate: Select the last day of your trip
forms.missionDestinationPlaceholder: Enter city, country, or address (e.g., Cairo, Egypt)
forms.provideDetailedReason: Please provide a detailed reason for your request...
forms.managerReasonPlaceholder: Provide details about your personal leave request (e.g., family vacation, personal appointment, etc.)...
forms.helpApprovalProcess: Provide clear details to help with the approval process
forms.managerApprovalHelp: As a manager, your request will go to HR/Admin for approval
forms.managerApprovalNote: As a manager, your personal leave requests will be sent directly to HR/Admin for approval. This is separate from the team requests you manage for your employees.
forms.adminApprovalNote: As an admin, your personal leave requests will be sent to HR/Super Admin for approval. This is separate from the requests you manage for other users.
forms.rememberTeamManagement: Remember: You can manage your team's requests from the Manager Dashboard
forms.rememberUserManagement: Remember: You can manage all user requests from the Admin Dashboard
forms.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to submit a form.
forms.cannotSubmitExcuseHours: Cannot submit: You only have {{remaining}} excuse hours left, but requesting {{requested}} hours.
forms.fileTooLarge: Medical document is too large. Please compress your file to under 15MB or use a smaller image/PDF.
forms.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload only PDF, Word documents (DOC/DOCX), or images (JPG/PNG).
forms.errorConnectingServer: Error connecting to server. Please check your connection and try again.

messages.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
messages.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

users.accountDraft: Account is in draft. Contact administrator to activate.
users.superAdminCannotDelete: Super admin accounts cannot be deleted
users.onlySuperAdminCanDeleteAdmin: Only super admins can delete admin accounts
users.superAdminCannotDraft: Super admin cannot be moved to draft

flags.title: Employee Flags
flags.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this flag?

otReports.title: OT Variance Reconciliation
otReports.subtitle: Compare fingerprint actuals against approved overtime requests for payroll.
otReports.noRows: No fingerprint overtime or approved overtime requests found for this date range.
otReports.noFinalRows: No Final OT rows for this date range.
otReports.finalNeedsApproval: Fingerprint OT appears in the Detailed report, but Final OT requires HR-final-approved Overtime Requests with Approved OT hours.
otReports.finalHint1: Manager approves the Overtime Request and sets Approved OT Hours.
otReports.finalHint2: Admin gives FINAL APPROVAL in Forms — only then rows appear here.
otReports.pendingHrCount: {{count}} overtime request(s) are awaiting HR final approval in this range.
otReports.otExistsNotApproved: Overtime requests exist in this range but none have HR final approval yet.
otReports.emptyHint1: Upload attendance so fingerprint OT appears on workdays with more than 8 hours.
otReports.emptyHint2: Employee submits an Overtime Request when fingerprint shows OT > 0 on a working day.
otReports.emptyHint3: Manager approves and Admin gives FINAL APPROVAL — approved rows appear in the Final report.
otReports.statFingerprintDays: {{count}} workday(s) with fingerprint OT (see Detailed report)
otReports.statOtRequestsSubmitted: {{count}} Overtime Request(s) submitted in this range
otReports.statPendingHr: {{count}} awaiting HR final approval (Forms tab → Overtime Request)
otReports.statNoFormsYet: No Overtime Requests submitted yet — fingerprint OT alone does not populate Final OT.
otReports.statGoApprove: Go to Forms → filter Overtime Request → give FINAL APPROVAL to populate this report.
otReports.noFilterResults: No rows match the current filters.
otReports.clickEmployeeHint: Click an employee row to see their day-by-day OT sequence.

deductionReports.title: Deduction Detailed Report
deductionReports.subtitle: 3-pillar salary deductions: missing punches, time shortfall (15-min grace), and full absence. Form waivers cancel biometric deductions.
deductionReports.noRows: No deduction rows for this date range.
deductionReports.noFilterResults: No rows match the current filters.
deductionReports.clickEmployeeHint: Click an employee row to see their day-by-day deduction sequence.

employeeOtReport.title: My Overtime Report
employeeOtReport.subtitle: Fingerprint overtime merged with your approved overtime requests for the selected pay period.
employeeOtReport.fetchError: Failed to load your overtime report
employeeOtReport.pendingNotice: {{count}} overtime request(s) still awaiting approval in this period.
employeeOtReport.noRows: No overtime activity found for this date range. Submit an Overtime Request when fingerprint attendance shows more than 8 hours on a working day.
employeeOtReport.footerNote: Final OT is the lower of fingerprint hours and HR-approved hours. Pending requests are not included until fully approved.
